narrative:
Green Twp-Combined township has 2,415 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.9 percentage points.
